title: EwMedieval Modpack
description: A modpack, with a medieval and realistic twist.
body:
![Banner of EWMedieval](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f26a5dc82b858f7829ae7f94c12a0dbf1d2db6f.jpeg)
*A medieval survival experience with a touch of ancient history - where every era has left its mark on the world.*
 
---
 
## The World Awaits
 
You step into a land reborn. The terrain has been reshaped from the ground up - mountains rise taller, valleys run deeper, and new ores wait to be unearthed. Don the armour of a medieval knight, forge your blade, and carve out your place in a world full of history - with a touch of ancient **Greek and Roman** heritage alongside it.
 
Tend your farm. Forge your blade. Build your settlement. **EwMedieval** turns Minecraft into the medieval world you always wanted.
 
---
 
## ⚔️ Features
 
- **Overhauled World Generation** - Completely reworked terrain with new biomes, landscapes and underground formations
- **Medieval Arms & Armour** - A wide variety of medieval weapons and armour, plus a touch of ancient Greek and Roman gear
- ⛏️ **New Ores & Materials** - New resources hidden underground waiting to be discovered and refined
- 🌾 **Farmer's Delight + Addons** - An overhauled farming and cooking system with most major addons included
- 📜 **Quests & Progression** - A structured journey guiding you from your first flint tools to a seasoned warrior
- 🤝 **Multiplayer Support** - Fully compatible with dedicated servers; conquer the medieval world with friends
- ⚡ **Performance Optimized** - Includes Sodium and other performance mods for a smooth experience
---
 
## Multiplayer
 
EwMedieval is built with multiplayer in mind. You can run a dedicated server or simply invite friends to your world. Most features - including quests and progression - work in co-op.
 
---
 
## Performance
 
No beefy PC required. EwMedieval ships with **Sodium** and a curated set of optimization mods to keep frame rates stable without sacrificing the visual experience.
 
| What's optimized | How |
|---|---|
| Rendering | Sodium + Dynamic FPS, etc |
| Memory usage | [e.g. FerriteCore, ModernFix] |
| World loading | [e.g. Noisium, Lithium] |
 
---
 
## FAQ
 
> **Q: Does this modpack support multiplayer?**
>
> **A:** Yes, EwMedieval works on both singleplayer and dedicated multiplayer servers.
 
> **Q: What Minecraft version and mod loader does this use?**
>
> **A:** **Minecraft 1.20.1** on the **Fabric** mod loader.
 
> **Q: How demanding is this pack on my PC?**
>
> **A:** Thanks to built-in performance mods like Sodium, the pack runs well on most modern systems. We recommend at least **6 GB of RAM** allocated to the launcher.
 
> **Q: Where do I report bugs or ask for help?**
>
> **A:** We will be adding a link to our github later on! (WIP), for now go to our discord!
 
---
